entry.note: <L>8891<pc>1-0667<k1>ABoga<k2>ABoga/ {#ABoga/#}¦ (von {#Buj, Bujati#} mit {#A#}) <lex>m.</lex> <div n="1"> 1) {%Windung, Krümmung, Wölbung%}: {#(gaNgA) ABogakuwilA#} (könnte auch zu 3. gehören) <ls>MBH. 3,9957.</ls> {#tezAM tu — rudatAM ruditasvanaH . prAsAdABogasaMvfdDo anvarOtsItsa rodasI#} <ls n="MBH.">15,1077.</ls> {#prAsAdABogavistIrRaH stutiSabdo 'Byavartata#} <ls>R. 2,65,3.</ls> {#mugDANganAnAM stanajaGanaBarABogasaMBoginInAm#} <ls>BHARTṚ. 1,19.</ls> {#pInastanABoga#} <ls>PRAB. 81,15.</ls> {#jaGanABoga#} <ls>ŚRUT. 40.</ls> {#gaRqABoga#} <ls>MEGH. 89.</ls> {#valIBaNgABogEH#} (von einem Betttuch) <ls>SĀH. D. 42,11.</ls> <ls>BALLANTYNE</ls> : {%with its crumplings, its rents, and its disorder.%} <div n="1">— 2) {%Ausdehnung, Fülle, Mannigfaltigkeit%} <ls>AK. 2,6,3,28.</ls> <ls>TRIK. 3,3,55.</ls> <ls>H. 1432.</ls> <ls>an. 3,117.</ls> <ls>MED. g. 29.</ls> {#samastaBUtalABogasaMBavAnAm#} ({#ratnAnAm#}) <ls>VID. 4.</ls> {#akaTito 'pi jYAyata eva yaTAyamABogastapovanasyeti#} <ls>ŚĀK. 8,1.</ls> {#vizayABogezu#} <ls>ŚĀNTIŚ. 4,20.</ls> {#BavABogodvignAH#} <ls>BHARTṚ. 3,85.</ls> <div n="1">— 3) {%Schlange%}: {#A\Bo\gaM hanma^nA hatamuda\DiM hanma^nA hatam#} <ls>ṚV. 7,94,12.</ls> <div n="1">— 4) {%die Anschwellung im Nacken der Brillenschlange, die sogenannte Haube%}: ({#BujaMgaM#}) {#parvatABogavarzmARam#} <ls>MBH. 3,12387.</ls> <ls n="MBH.">16,118.</ls> wird als <is>Varuṇa's</is> Sonnenschirm betrachtet, daher = {#varuRacCatra#} <ls>H. an.</ls> <ls>MED.</ls> — Diese und <ls>TRIK.</ls> haben noch die Bedeutung {%Anstrengung%} ({#yatna#}), ... [truncated]

<L>15112<pc>1-179-a<k1>ABoga<k2>ABoga/<h>1 <hom>1.</hom> {#ABoga/#}¦ <lex>m.</lex> <div n="1">— 1〉 {%Biegung, Krümmung%} <ls>MBH. 3,109,11</ls>. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%Rundung, Wölbung%}. <div n="1">— 3〉 {%Umfänglichkeit, Ausgedehntheit%} <ls>MBH. 3,178,25.</ls> <ls n="MBH.">15,38,21.</ls> <ls n="MBH.">16,4,14</ls>. <ls>R. 2,65,3</ls>. <ls>ŚĀK. 8,1</ls>. <ls>KATHĀS. 18,72</ls>. <ls>BĀLAR. 27,23</ls>. eines Lautes, so <ab>v. a.</ab> {%Kräftigkeit%} <ls>KĀD. II,74,5</ls> <div n="1">— 4〉 {%Mannichfaltigkeit%} <ls>Spr. 1443</ls>. <ls n="Spr.">7254</ls>. <div n="1">— 5〉 {%Schlange%}. <div n="1">— 6〉 {%das Finale einer Composition%} <ls>S. S. S. 120</ls>. <div n="1">— 7〉 *{%Anstrengung%}. <div n="1">— 8〉 <is>Varuṇa</is>ʼs {%Sonnenschirm%}. <LEND>
